description_long: This is a high-top athletic shoe with a modern, streamlined silhouette, featuring a predominantly matte gray upper and light blue accents along the sole, toe, and heel. The shoe has a reinforced toe cap, padded collar, and a sculpted midsole that provides both support and style. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated textile, with visible stitching and panel overlays for durability. The lacing system is standard criss-cross, with eyelets running up the front and a tongue that is slightly padded for comfort. The outsole is thick and robust, likely made of rubber, and extends slightly outward for added stability. The overall design suggests a focus on both performance and urban fashion, suitable for streetwear or casual athletic use.
description: A modern high-top athletic shoe in matte gray with light blue accents, featuring a sculpted sole and standard criss-cross lacing. The design blends performance features with urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sculpted sole, light blue accents, and panel overlays on the upper.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, padded tongue, and reinforced toe cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same sculpted sole and panel details, with visible stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel support, and light blue accent on the heel.
